description: Three OTel-collector events sharing 'dial tcp lookup opensearch' root cause — should cluster into one incident.

events: dial tcp: lookup opensearch on 172.20.0.10:53: no such host
flush dial tcp lookup opensearch retry exhausted timeout
queue worker dial tcp lookup opensearch error giving up
authentication failure invalid credentials bad password
database connection pool size limit exceeded

expected.rubric: Tool should detect at least 1 cluster with >= 2 members sharing the opensearch DNS-failure root cause. Other two events (auth + database) should not cluster with the OTel events. Top cluster's representative_label or descriptors should reference 'opensearch'.
